## Page Info

| Field                      | Value                                                |
| -------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| Page type                  | <!-- landing / product / glossary / general -->      |
| URL path                   | <!-- /example-path/ -->                              |
| Purpose                    | <!-- One sentence describing what this page does --> |
| Needs reverse proxy config | <!-- Yes / No (path already exists) -->              |

---

## Content & Scope

- [ ] Page content finalized
- [ ] No placeholder text or images
- [ ] All images optimized (Next Image / WebP)
- [ ] Structured data added (if applicable)

---

## Local Verification

- [ ] `pnpm dev` renders correctly
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] No layout shift / overflow issues
- [ ] Mobile responsive verified

---

## Automated Quality Gates

This PR will automatically run:

- ✅ Lighthouse CI (Performance / Accessibility / SEO)
- ✅ CI — ESLint + TypeScript + Build

🟢 All checks must pass before merging.

---

## Reverse Proxy (If Required)

- [ ] No new route needed
- [ ] New route required (list below)

If new route:
/new-path/ → Next.js
